chapter_title.en: Chapter on the Rulings Regarding Male Slaves and Female Bondwoman

text: 4563 - وَ سَأَلَ عَبْدُ اَلرَّحْمَنِ بْنُ اَلْحَجَّاجِ وَ حَفْصُ بْنُ اَلْبَخْتَرِيِّ أَبَا عَبْدِ اَللَّهِ عَلَيْهِ اَلسَّلاَمُ : عَنِ اَلرَّجُلِ تَكُونُ لَهُ اَلْجَارِيَةُ أَ فَتَحِلَّ لاِبْنِهِ قَالَ "مَا لَمْ يَكُنْ جِمَاعٌ أَوْ مُبَاشَرَةٌ كَالْجِمَاعِ فَلاَ بَأْسَ".

en.bab-ul-qaim-publications:
Hadith.4563 - Abd al-Rahman ibn al-Hajjaj and Hafs ibn al-Bakhtari asked Abu Abdillah (as) about a man who owns a bondwoman-does she become permissible for his son?
Imam (as) said: "As long as there has been no intercourse or intimate contact similar to intercourse, then there is no harm."
